claims.name: Existence of a common reasoning structure
claims.maximum_supported_scope: none beyond bounded recurring similarities; THM-TARGET-001 fixes the S_core question, FAITHFUL-REP-001 fixes the predicate, and SCORE-LEMMA-LEDGER-001 registers the unproved dependencies
claims.primary_resolution_mode: existence proof or formal impossibility/countermodel over a frozen source class
claims.required_next_test: prove or refute the W0 normalization obligations LEM-SC-001 through LEM-SC-004, then execute the remaining common-schema dependencies
claims.supporting_validation: bounded model search, counterexample programs, and independent proof review
claims.falsification_condition: a formal in-scope incompatibility or impossibility result showing that no common structure satisfies the registered commitments
nonclaims: registering a lemma ledger proves existence

claims.name: FAR bounded representational sufficiency
claims.maximum_supported_scope: specific frozen systems and mappings already tested; no theorem-level S_core result and no registered lemma is proved
claims.primary_resolution_mode: scoped faithful-representation theorem or formal countermodel
claims.required_next_test: execute SCORE-LEMMA-LEDGER-001 beginning with W0, then assemble or refute an arbitrary-episode Faithful_split witness
claims.supporting_validation: PBTS-001, negative controls, mechanized conformance, and independent replication
claims.falsification_condition: an in-scope source object satisfies the frozen source definition but admits no faithful target representation under the theorem obligations
nonclaims: registering construction obligations is a sufficiency proof

claims.name: FAR universality
claims.maximum_supported_scope: none; S_core is a bounded first theorem scope and S_IRD remains an extension target
claims.primary_resolution_mode: formal theorem quantified over an independently defined source class, or a formal countermodel
claims.required_next_test: resolve the S_core lemma program and finite-core theorem first, then establish or refute extension to S_IRD without promoting the bounded result
claims.supporting_validation: adversarial holdouts, boundary discovery, and independent proof review
nonclaims: absence of discovered counterexamples proves universality
a proof over S_core proves S_IRD universality

claims.name: Necessity of FAR primitives
claims.primary_resolution_mode: primitive lower-bound or independence proof over a declared reconstruction class
claims.required_next_test: after a successful representation theorem, define the admissible reconstruction class and prove indispensability, derivability, or replaceability for each commitment
claims.falsification_condition: a valid general construction omits the tested primitive without equivalent reintroduction under the declared equivalence model
nonclaims: the theorem-facing FARA tuple is minimal

claims.name: FAR minimality
claims.primary_resolution_mode: minimality, lower-bound, uniqueness, or no-minimum theorem over a declared candidate universe
claims.required_next_test: define the candidate universe, equivalence relation, and cost preorder only after the representation obligations are stable
claims.supporting_validation: full-cost Pareto comparison and bounded exhaustive search
claims.falsification_condition: a strictly simpler admissible structure is proved equivalent for the same theorem scope, or no global minimum exists
nonclaims: finite competitor comparison establishes global minimality

claims.name: FAR imposes nontrivial representational constraints
claims.maximum_supported_scope: implementation-specific checks plus the frozen prospective constraints of FAITHFUL-REP-001 and the unproved obstruction program OBS-SC-001 through OBS-SC-010
claims.primary_resolution_mode: formal faithful-representation theorem and obstruction lemmas excluding unrestricted coding
claims.required_next_test: prove the registered negative controls fail for the frozen reasons and show that at least one nontrivial S_core witness can satisfy the definition
claims.falsification_condition: the formal representation relation admits structurally unfaithful encodings with no additional counted commitment
nonclaims: registering obstruction lemmas proves every invalid encoding is rejected

claims.name: FAR comparative economy
claims.primary_resolution_mode: formal equivalence classes and declared cost relations, supplemented by full-cost Pareto analysis
claims.required_next_test: define equivalence and cost commitments after the faithful theorem scope is stable, then compare strong admissible alternatives
claims.supporting_validation: canonical full-cost experiments across frozen competitor mappings
claims.falsification_condition: FAR is dominated or its apparent advantage depends on uncounted machinery

claims.name: Independent verification and replication
claims.maximum_supported_scope: internal isolated implementation robustness where completed
claims.primary_resolution_mode: separate independent proof-review and independent empirical-replication records
claims.required_next_test: after proof artifacts exist, obtain independent proof reconstruction; continue R3 PBTS replication as a parallel supporting track
claims.supporting_validation: R3 technical replication, R4 adversarial conceptual replication, proof-assistant replay, and external countermodel search
claims.falsification_condition: qualified independent reviewers identify a valid proof defect, or qualified replicators cannot reproduce the frozen empirical result
nonclaims: lack of external review makes a deduction an empirical result

claim_dimensions.theorem_status: whether a formal claim is proved, refuted, bounded, or unresolved
claim_dimensions.mechanization_status: whether the formal artifact is machine checked and under which trusted assumptions
claim_dimensions.independent_proof_review_status: whether independent reviewers reconstructed or challenged the proof
claim_dimensions.empirical_replication_status: whether frozen evaluations were independently reproduced
claim_dimensions.application_status: whether implementations or domains satisfy the stated bounded contract
